caption: In the video, a person wearing a white lab coat is seated at a table in what appears to be a laboratory or workshop setting. The individual is holding and demonstrating a small mechanical device, possibly a model of an engine or a similar apparatus. Various tools and components, including batteries and a clamp stand, are laid out on the table. The person gestures with their hands while speaking, likely explaining the function or assembly of the device. The background features shelves stocked with containers and supplies, indicating a well-organized workspace. The lighting is bright, suggesting a professional environment focused on technical or educational content.
